title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at GAIL India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at GAIL India
jsonLd.description:
GAIL India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About GAIL India:
GAIL India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India!
